textByHashes.85c9c868c8ab690dab4f279cbabfaf8383d7d829: Welcome to my little chapel. Can I help you?
textByHashes.bd99e99007c21a53107a5f9e03cda997bc28910c: I built this chapel here so that fighters could come and pray before battle. A fighter who ignores their spiritual needs may as well have stabbed themselves in the foot.
textByHashes.c2f28cc55355a1ade586261886af5112b2b1cac5: People keep claiming they're not interested in religion, but as soon as they're under attack they're yelling for 'Protect from Melee'. Sad, really.
textByHashes.5a188d767b0deebea772741112c50214736abb36: So is there something I can do for you?
textByHashes.122ce9f59112c6bed2f3fbc474dd9bfe8311c825: [laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh], very funny! With jokes like that, you should become a banker.
textByHashes.bc95ecfce708b92f2bb08c36587ce4b472701f83: But no I am a sister to the broken and down trodden, I heard talk of this enclave being built and knew that my skills could be put to good use.
textByHashes.1c5f8f23b0d9107132ed7cd6e282f2fddcc046a1: I've found a worthy cause here running my little chapel, so I'm happy enough. Now, can I help you with something?
textByHashes.d0475318aef81e3eb6a37ab8671f3f846f9feaed: Actually, that's a bit of a sore point. Asgarnia has a building full of monks, all living happily as a community of brothers, but they don't let women join.
textByHashes.3e425ee89c22f10c71eb1ac061387896950e2c6f: I'd heard rumours that there was an Abbey up here somewhere, which sounded marvellous, but I seem to be in the wrong place.
textByHashes.3f43e9852691d9f04d0de632191477a37065bf55: Anyway, I've found a worthy cause here, running my little chapel, so I'm happy enough. Now, can I help you with something?
